notes: Fixture is actually the Mountain Creek homepage (page-id-2), not the /events or /event-calendar page. The page links to an Event Calendar at /activities-events/event-calendar/ but does not enumerate event listings inline. The only dated, event-like item promoted on this page is the Wedding Expo on May 30th (post URL slug /2026/03/11/wedding-expo-2026/ implies the 2026 edition; today is 2026-05-19, so the next May 30th resolves to 2026-05-30 in America/New_York). Everything else on the page is evergreen marketing (Summit Celebration Series promo, Bike Park Triple Play Cards, Gift Cards), navigation, operating-hours taglines ("Now Open Thu-Sun"), lodging/lift/rental/lesson CTA tabs, a YouTube embed, and an Instagram feed widget -- all of which are correctly rejected per the rules.

expected_events.title: Wedding Expo
expected_events.date_evidence: Mark your calendars for our next Wedding Expo on May 30th
